mapper.select: SELECT h.*, u.display_name AS approved_by_name FROM blog_post_histories h LEFT JOIN users u ON h.approved_by = u.user_id WHERE h.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY h.version DESC
SELECT h.*, u.display_name AS approved_by_name FROM blog_post_histories h LEFT JOIN users u ON h.approved_by = u.user_id WHERE h.history_id = #{historyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_post_histories ( post_id, version, title, content, category, thumbnail_url, approved_at, approved_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{version}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{approvedAt}, #{approvedById}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
